# Pyproject

Converted from `reference_implementation/pyproject.toml` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

```toml
[project]
name = "ad-factory-reference"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Mock bounded autonomous ad factory scaffold"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = []

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
pythonpath = ["."]
```
